diagnosis: All 22 frozen training-side source-fit events land within ~2 cm of the square obtained by rotating the labeled square 180 degrees about the board center; a single planar rigid transform (rotation 176.8 degrees) reduces the frozen 0.310 m identity event RMS to 0.018 m.

The owner video review states the robot-side sparse row is B1/C2/D1/E2/F1/G2, while the frozen scene places ranks 7/8 on the robot side; the display-only correction in commit ade3fff confirmed the mismatch without changing the frozen evaluator scene.

The repeatable folded rest pose (stdev ~0.1 degree across 18 episodes) sits a few degrees outside the vendored model's conservative ranges on exactly the joints that clip, so joint signs are identity and the frozen no-clipping admission rule mathematically excluded the near-identity mapping.

The remaining +0.0875 m mean vertical residual is consistent with constant per-joint zero offsets from the user-eyeballed LeRobot calibration middle pose, not with the rejected multi-radian adapter offsets.

fit.stage_b: planar board center/yaw refit, xy residuals only, bounds +/-0.08 m and +/-15 degrees
fit.stage_c: bounded per-joint zero offsets for shoulder_pan, shoulder_lift, elbow_flex, wrist_flex, full 3D residuals, jointly with stage-B parameters
fit.stage_c_prime: stage C plus a bounded base-height correction (the overhead photo cannot observe base z) and a bounded non-negative reopen-phase timing z nuisance (the frozen extractor's reopen event fires after retreat begins)
fit.stage_d: lift-dominant hypothesis: a single shoulder-lift zero offset (bounded 25 degrees) explains the vertical residual as one horn-spline tooth reseat or a badly eyeballed calibration middle on that joint; pan/elbow/wrist keep a 3-degree prior; includes the reopen timing nuisance
fit.candidate_selection_rule: among stage C, stage C-prime, and stage D, select the candidate with more train episodes showing selected-piece jaw contact in command-driven replay; tie broken by lower train event RMS; declared before held-out episodes are opened
fit.wrist_roll_offset_fixed_zero_reason: rotation about the gripper axis is unobservable in pinch-point position
fit.range_envelope: per-joint union of the LeRobot calibration sweep ((ticks-2048)*360/4096 degrees) and training-episode command/actual excursions, plus 2 degrees margin, applied to the compiled model in memory

data_binding.train_scope: frozen sysid train partition intersected with the 13 owner-reviewed product recordings (11 episodes, 22 events)
data_binding.held_out_scope: product held-out episodes d1-to-d2 and g1-to-g2-redo, opened exactly once after the candidate is frozen
